text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Trainer... somehow, I'm feeling a bit tired.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
To what extent can we consider something
"okay?" Nevertheless, my having noticed this
fatigue probably warrants due consideration.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
But there's still so much research and
experimentation to be done.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Groan... Yet, this exhaustion... what am I to do?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon won't stop sighing, perhaps due
to her fatigue. I should probably rethink her
upcoming race schedule.
